post_fix_verification.note: All 63 post-fix NULL sport_id picks are synthetic test artifacts. Zero real organic board picks have NULL sport_id post-fix. Attribution blocker cleared for organic picks. No board-scan cycle has run post-fix yet.

picks.clv_note: CLV schema EXISTS in market_universe (closing_line, closing_over_odds, closing_under_odds). Join path: picks -> pick_candidates (pick_id) -> market_universe (universe_id). CLV unavailable because: (1) post-cutover market_universe rows have 0 closing data (open markets), (2) no pick_candidates exist for post-cutover universe_ids (no join path). No migration required — monitor query was wrong.

clv_canonical_source.join_path: picks -> pick_candidates ON pick_id -> market_universe ON universe_id
clv_canonical_source.computation_model: on-read JOIN — not materialized on picks table
clv_canonical_source.fix_required: T2 — monitor query correction only, no migration

flags.title: CLV unavailable — no closing data + no join path (schema exists)
flags.detail: CLV schema EXISTS in market_universe (closing_line, closing_over_odds, closing_under_odds). No migration required. CLV unavailable because: (1) post-cutover market_universe rows have 0 closing data (open markets, not yet settled); (2) no pick_candidates for post-cutover universe_ids so the picks->pick_candidates->market_universe JOIN yields nothing. Fix: T2 monitor query correction + wait for closing line ingest + board scan on post-cutover universe_ids.
